title: AI-SDLC variant-config.yaml
description: Per-organization variant configuration schema per RFC-0017 §10.1. Ships as '.ai-sdlc/variant-config.yaml' (per-org defaults). Per-Soul overrides may live in the soul's own spec.variantConfig block. Default constants: softWarnAt=5 (Miller 7±2 cognitive-load threshold), hardLimit=20 (re-architect-as-multi-soul threshold per RFC-0009 §3).

limits.description: OQ-1 — per-org variant count thresholds. Defaults: softWarnAt=5, hardLimit=20.

softWarnAt.description: Variant count at which a non-blocking Decision 'variant-count-soft-warning' is emitted. Default 5 (Miller 7±2 cognitive-load threshold).

hardLimit.description: Variant count at which declaration is rejected with Decision 'variant-count-hard-limit-exceeded' plus a clarification task recommending multi-soul re-architecture. Default 20 (re-architect threshold per RFC-0009 §3). MUST be greater than softWarnAt.

lifecycle.description: OQ-3 — variant deprecation and removal lifecycle.

deprecationWindowDays.description: Default deprecation window in days before a variant may be hard-removed. Default 30 (internal-config cadence). Per-Soul override via soul's spec.variantConfig.lifecycle.deprecationWindowDays.

routing.description: Decision-Catalog routing for variant lifecycle events.

onDeclared.description: Action when deprecation declared. Default: log to Decision Catalog without interrupting the pipeline.

onApproaching.description: Action when deprecation window is approaching. Default: surface in operator batch review.

onConsumersPending.description: Action when removal requested but consumers still reference the variant. Default: keep variant in degraded mode and emit migration tasks.

crossVariantAggregation.description: Default cross-variant aggregation rule. Default 'min' — matches RFC-0009 §7.2 cross-soul default. Per-Soul override via soul's spec.variantConfig.scoring.crossVariantAggregation.

overrides.description: OQ-5 (revised 2026-05-26) — framework-owned designOverrides fields and adopter extension policy.

framework.description: Closed enum of framework-owned designOverrides field names. Expanding requires RFC amendment with Design Authority sign-off.

adopterExtensionsAllowed.description: Whether adopters may extend designOverrides via vendor reverse-DNS prefix (e.g. 'acme.com/accessibilityProfile'). Default true.

format.description: Path-style URI format template per RFC-0017 OQ-6 resolution. The explicit 'variant:' keyword preserves the parent/child hierarchy.

declarationOwner.description: Which authority owns variant declarations. Always 'design' per RFC-0017 OQ-7 + RFC-0029 Principle 1.

substrateCostReview.description: Engineering review routing for substrate-cost concerns.

blockDecision.description: Decision Catalog key emitted when Engineering blocks on substrate cost.

adopterRequests.description: Number of distinct adopter requests before cardinality activation is auto-promoted to operator batch review. Default 2.

routing.description: How cardinality activation requests are routed.
